description: Polish pass: ensure all animations work correctly with proper 'use client' directives, fix any build issues, add finishing touches like magnetic buttons, mouse-follow effects on service cards, proper responsive design across all breakpoints, and accessibility attributes. Final production readiness check.
steps: Audit all components for proper 'use client' directives - any component using useState, useEffect, useRef, event handlers, or GSAP must be a client component. Server components should not import client-side libraries.
Create components/MagneticButton.tsx: Reusable magnetic button component that pulls toward cursor on hover using GSAP. Apply to all CTA buttons and interactive elements across the site.

Review and fix responsive design across all pages: mobile (< 768px), tablet (768-1024px), desktop (1024px+). Ensure massive typography scales down appropriately on mobile (use clamp() or responsive vw units). Fix any overflow issues.

Add accessibility attributes throughout: proper heading hierarchy (h1-h6), aria-labels on interactive elements, focus states on all buttons/links, skip-to-content link, proper alt text on images, role attributes where needed, reduced-motion media query support (disable complex animations for users who prefer reduced motion).
Ensure all GSAP animations have proper cleanup in useEffect return functions to prevent memory leaks
Add loading states and skeleton screens where appropriate (especially for the video elements)
Review the consultation form for proper HTML5 validation attributes, proper form semantics, and accessibility (label associations, error messages, fieldset for checkbox group)
Run final npm run build and npm run lint, fix any remaining errors
Verify the production build output is clean with no warnings about missing dependencies or hydration mismatches
acceptance_criteria: npm run build passes with zero errors
npm run lint passes with zero errors
All client components have 'use client' directive
No hydration mismatch warnings in build output
Magnetic button component exists and is applied to CTAs
All pages are responsive from mobile to desktop
Accessibility: all images have alt text, all interactive elements are keyboard accessible, heading hierarchy is correct
GSAP animations clean up properly (no memory leaks)
findings: All changes build and lint clean with zero errors and zero warnings. MagneticButton applied to 4 buttons (Nav CTA, Footer Start a Project, Footer back-to-top, ServiceCTA Request Consultation, ContactCTA Request Consultation). Reduced motion support added to Hero, Process, DesignShowcase, and ServiceContent components. Skip-to-content link added to layout. All GSAP animations already used gsap.context() with proper cleanup. All components already had correct use client directives. No hydration warnings in build output.
